1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS

PRC_MEDICAID Prostate Cancer Indicator - Medicaid-Only Data NUM 1 This code specifies whether the enrollee met the chronic condition algorithm criteria, considering only Medicaid data, for having Prostate Cancer Values:
0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
